# Dao De Jing

*[Laozi](../philosophers/laozi.md) · 300 BCE · *道德經**

An aphoristic collection of eighty-one short chapters traditionally ascribed to [Laozi](../philosophers/laozi.md), the founding text of [Taoism](../movements/taoism.md): it unfolds the [Dao](../glossary/dao.md) (the ineffable way), [wu wei](../glossary/wu-wei.md) (non-action) and the return to natural simplicity. Its dating and authorship remain disputed.
